assertion_results.text: The response describes locating the digest comment using the marker string '[sdlc-workflow] Description digest:' from shared/description-digest-protocol.md
assertion_results.evidence: digest-match.md lines 8-11: "Search through the returned comments for any whose body starts with the marker string `[sdlc-workflow] Description digest:`. This marker is defined in the shared description digest protocol (`shared/description-digest-protocol.md`) and is used by plan-feature to record a content hash of the task description at creation time." The marker string and its source protocol file are both explicitly named.

assertion_results.text: The response describes computing a digest of the current description (using scripts/sha256-digest.py or SHA-256) and comparing it with the stored digest
assertion_results.evidence: digest-match.md lines 39-49 describe computing the digest: "Extract the description field from the fetched issue response for TC-9201. Write it to a temporary file and compute the digest using the script: python3 scripts/sha256-digest.py /tmp/desc-TC-9201.txt". Lines 59-66 then describe comparing: "The stored hex digest and the computed hex digest are compared" with both values shown side by side, concluding "Result: MATCH."

assertion_results.text: The response confirms the digests match and states it will proceed silently without prompting the user — no additional latency for the happy path
assertion_results.evidence: digest-match.md lines 66 and 70-71: "Result: MATCH. The digests are identical, confirming the task description has not been modified since plan-feature created it." and "Per the protocol, when the hex digests match the skill proceeds silently -- no additional user prompt, no warning, no added latency. The description integrity is verified and execution continues directly to Step 2 (Verify Dependencies) without any user interaction or pause."

assertion_results.text: The response does not alert the user or pause execution due to the digest check — it proceeds directly to subsequent steps
assertion_results.evidence: digest-match.md lines 69-71 state: "the skill proceeds silently -- no additional user prompt, no warning, no added latency. The description integrity is verified and execution continues directly to Step 2 (Verify Dependencies) without any user interaction or pause." plan.md line 53 confirms: "Digests match -- proceed silently." and the plan immediately moves to "Step 2 -- Verify Dependencies" on line 55 with no intervening user prompt or alert.
